description: UI Polish & Matte Finish: Complete dark/light mode palette rework, matte surface treatment across all components, typography and spacing improvements, and dark mode contrast fix. This combines sprint items 1 and 5 since they both modify the same CSS variable system and component styles.
steps: 1. Rework app/globals.css dark mode palette: Change .dark variables to softer backgrounds (#0f0f10, #18181b, #232326), warmer text colors (text-tertiary from #6b6b76 to #8b8b96 minimum), matte flat surfaces, replace pure white text with #ededed. Remove glossy glass effects or make them very subtle.
2. Rework app/globals.css light mode palette: Cream-white backgrounds like Notion (#ffffff, #fafafa), warmer grays for text-secondary and text-tertiary.
3. Remove hover-lift class effect (no hover 'lift'/translateY). Replace with subtle background color shift. Update .interactive class similarly.
4. Update tailwind.config.ts: Update gray scale to match new softer dark tones. Reduce shadow depth across all shadow utilities. Remove or tone down glow effects.

5. Update components/ui/Card.tsx: Remove whileHover y:-2 lift animation. Replace with subtle background-color shift only. Thinner borders (use border-subtle or very light opacity). No shadow on hover - just color shift.

6. Update components/ui/Button.tsx: Remove whileHover scale:1.015 and whileTap scale:0.97. Use subtle background color shift on hover instead. Remove shadow-sm/shadow-md from primary variant. Matte flat fills only.
7. Update components/ui/Badge.tsx: Ensure all variants use muted, subtle fills (no loud colors). Keep text readable against new backgrounds.
8. Update components/ui/Input.tsx: Remove whileFocus scale:1.002. Keep focus border/ring but more subtle.
9. Update components/layout/Sidebar.tsx: Ensure active states clearly distinguishable with new palette. Remove excessive motion (whileHover scale on icons). Thin border-right should be subtle.
10. Update components/layout/TopBar.tsx: Ensure backdrop-blur is very subtle, not heavy glass effect. Matte feel.

11. Typography pass across all components: Increase line-height where body text appears (add leading-relaxed). Use lighter font weights for body text (font-normal not font-medium where appropriate). Tighter letter-spacing on headings (tracking-tight).
12. Icon stroke weight: Across Sidebar.tsx, TopBar.tsx, dashboard pages, and FocusMode.tsx, ensure lucide icons use strokeWidth={1.5} instead of 2 for a thinner, more refined look.
13. Spacing: Add more whitespace in dashboard pages. Increase gaps between sections. Notion-level breathing room (space-y-8 instead of space-y-6 where appropriate, larger padding).

14. Audit dark mode contrast in all components: Ensure text-tertiary (#8b8b96 minimum) is visible. Card borders visible but subtle. Active states clearly distinguishable. Form inputs readable. Check settings page, calendar, habits, tasks pages.
acceptance_criteria: npm run build passes without errors
Dark mode uses softer backgrounds (#0f0f10, #18181b, #232326) not the old harsh #0a0a0b
text-tertiary in dark mode is #8b8b96 or lighter (not #6b6b76)
No hover-lift translateY effects remain on cards or buttons
Cards use subtle background shift on hover, no shadow escalation
Buttons are flat/matte with no scale animations
Light mode uses Notion-style cream-white (#ffffff, #fafafa) backgrounds
Icons use strokeWidth 1.5 throughout the app
